name: HNS_STAKEHOLDERS_
description: HNS STAKEHOLDERS. This table stores stakeholders related data. Stakeholder is used across Incident/Action/Investigations.

columns.Name: STAKEHOLDER_ID
columns.Comments: STAKEHOLDER_ID unique identifier. Primary key for HNS_STAKEHOLDERS table.

columns.Name: TASK_ID
columns.Comments: Task Assigned to the stakeholder.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ID
columns.Comments: Employee ID of the stakeholder . The column will be blank if the stakeholder is not an employee.

columns.Name: PERSON_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment ID of the stakeholder . The column will be blank if the stakeholder is not an employee.

columns.Name: TASK_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Task Type identifier. Lookup to the Task Type FND lookup.

columns.Name: STAKEHOLDER_NAME
columns.Comments: The name of the person (Non employee) who is assigned as stakeholder. For Employee name will be blank.

columns.Name: STAKEHOLDER_EMAIL
columns.Comments: The email ID of the person (Non Employee) who is assigned as stakeholder. For Employee this will be blank.

columns.Name: STAKEHOLDER_TERRITORY_CODE
columns.Comments: STAKEHOLDER_TERRITORY_CODE column : Stakeholder (Non Employee) Territory code. For Employee this will be blank.

columns.Name: STAKEHOLDER_AREA_CODE
columns.Comments: STAKEHOLDER_AREA_CODE column : Stakeholder (Non Employee) phone area code. For Employee this will be blank.

columns.Name: STAKEHOLDER_PHONENO
columns.Comments: The phone number of the person (Non Employee) who is assigned as stakeholder. For Employee phone number will be blank.

columns.Name: STAKEHOLDER_PERSON_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stakeholder person type. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP EMP/NON EMP lookup.

columns.Name: STAKEHOLDER_CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stakeholder Category. Lookup for Compliance/Executive/Manager Stakeholder category.

columns.Name: STAKEHOLDER_ORG_NAME
columns.Comments: SStakeholder Organization Name. In case stakeholder is non-employee, organization stakeholder belongs to.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to check whether is record is deleted.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
